COUNSEL INDICATED THIS IS A STIPULATED CONTINUANCE REQUEST, HOWEVER REPORTED TO THE COURT THAT THE CASE HAD COMPLETELY SETTLED AT THE MSC YESTERDAY AND REQUESTED AN OSC RE DISMISSAL DATE FOR OCTOBER. APPEARING FOR DEFENDANT RAYMOND BENTLEY VIA COURTCALL. THE COURT FINDS GOOD CAUSE TO GRANT PLAINTIFFS' MOTION TO CONTINUE TRIAL PURSUANT TO CRC 3.1332(C)(7). THE TRIAL DATE OF 11/2/20 IS CONTINUED TO 5/3/21 AT 9:30AM IN DEPT. 206 PURSUANT TO PARTIES' STIPULATION. ALL PRETRIAL DEADLINES INCLUDING DISCOVERY, EXPERT DISCLOSURES, AND MOTION PRACTICE GOVERNED BY THE NEW TRIAL DATE. ORDER SIGNED IN OPEN COURT. JUDGE: GARRETT L. WONG; CLERK: R. VELUZ; MATTER NOT REPORTED. (206)
